name: cocktailapp
description: CocktailApp — reconstructed & modernized full-stack app (Angular + NestJS + MongoDB Atlas).

scripts.build:catalog: npm run build:shared && npm run validate:seed && node scripts/build-catalog.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:dev --workspace backend" "npm run start --workspace frontend"
